name: AI Marketing Suite for Claude Code
description: A comprehensive AI-powered marketing suite that provides 15 distinct marketing skills using parallel subagents, enabling website audits, marketing copy generation, email sequences, ad campaigns, content calendars, competitive intelligence, and client-ready PDF report creation.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: The URL of the website to audit and gather marketing insights from.

inputs.name: campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Parameters including target audience, goals, budget, and product details required to generate marketing copy, email sequences, and ad campaigns.

inputs.name: content_schedule_requirements
inputs.description: Details or preferences for creating content calendars such as frequency, content types, and distribution channels.

inputs.name: competitive_data
inputs.description: Information or URLs related to competitors for performing competitive intelligence.

inputs.name: report_preferences
inputs.description: Options defining the structure, focus, and style of client-ready PDF reports.

outputs.name: website_audit_report
outputs.description: Detailed audit results of a website including strengths, weaknesses, and marketing opportunities.

outputs.name: marketing_copy
outputs.description: Generated marketing copy tailored to the specified campaign parameters.

outputs.name: email_sequences
outputs.description: A sequence of marketing emails designed to nurture leads or engage customers.

outputs.name: ad_campaigns
outputs.description: Structured ad campaign concepts and creatives ready for deployment.

outputs.name: content_calendar
outputs.description: A scheduling plan for future content publishing across platforms.

outputs.name: competitive_intelligence_report
outputs.description: Insights and analyses comparing client and competitor marketing presence and strategies.

outputs.name: client_ready_pdf_report
outputs.description: Comprehensive, formatted PDF report suitable for client presentation.

patterns: Parallel subagent orchestration to handle multiple marketing tasks concurrently
Automated website auditing for marketing insights
Template-driven generation of marketing copy and email sequences
Content calendar creation based on input scheduling preferences
Extraction and synthesis of competitive intelligence
Automated generation of professional PDF reports
steps: Receive input parameters including website URL, campaign details, content calendar requirements, competitive data, and report preferences
Launch parallel subagents to concurrently perform website audit, copywriting, email sequence creation, ad campaign design, content calendar generation, and competitive intelligence gathering
Format and compile the aggregated data into client-ready PDF reports
Deliver completed marketing assets and reports to the user
use_cases: Marketing teams auditing and improving client websites
Businesses generating targeted marketing copy and campaigns quickly
Content managers planning and automating content publication
Agencies creating polished, comprehensive reports for clients

prompt_templates.name: Website Audit Prompt
prompt_templates.template: Audit the website at {website_url} and identify marketing strengths, weaknesses, and opportunities.

prompt_templates.name: Marketing Copy Generation
prompt_templates.template: Generate compelling marketing copy for a campaign targeting {target_audience} with the following product details: {product_details}.

prompt_templates.name: Email Sequence Creation
prompt_templates.template: Create an email marketing sequence with {number_of_emails} emails designed to {campaign_goal}.

prompt_templates.name: Ad Campaign Design
prompt_templates.template: Design an ad campaign for {product_or_service} with the budget of {budget} targeting {audience_description}.

prompt_templates.name: Content Calendar Planning
prompt_templates.template: Create a content calendar for {time_period} with content focused on {topics} and publishing frequency of {frequency}.

prompt_templates.name: Competitive Intelligence Report
prompt_templates.template: Analyze competitors based on {competitive_data} and provide a detailed comparison report.

prompt_templates.name: Generate Client Report
prompt_templates.template: Compile all marketing assets into a client-ready PDF report with focus on {report_focus}.
